subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be salutations and praise, O pride of the female kindred of that Blessed Tree whose Root is firmly established
subcodes.first_line_orig: علیک التحیه و الثناء یا فخر النساء المنتسبه الی الشجره المبارکه الثابته الاصل
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for the departed, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @eulogies; reminiscences
